posts.text:
You can listen to the new episode of #BleepWithAnaNavarro anywhere you get your podcasts.

Video

You can catch my unvarnished, uncensored views on the Lie-a-Palooza, formerly referred to as the State of the Union, on my new podcast. You can catch #BleepWthAnsNavarro anywhere you get your podcasts.

Video

Some personal news: I have a new podcast coming out today, #BleepWithAnaNavarro. Named in honor of all the times I get bleeped on tv while reacting to crazy shit happening in our country and world. Daily.

Video
Nothing can take away my joy and pride, today.

Yup. Maria Corina Machado gave the Toddler-in-Chief his fixation. He will never change.

Video
I thought this press conference was supposed to be about Venezuela? 😂😂😂

How Epstein’s Victims Were Failed by Four Administrations⁠
⁠
Ana Navarro (@ananavarrofl) joins @joannacoles to discuss the issues that have persisted for decades that veiled Jeffrey Epstein’s crimes, unpacking why Merrick Garland didn’t release the files while serving as attorney general.⁠
⁠
Have a question or comment for us? Send us an email: beastpod@thedailybeast.com⁠
⁠
Subscribe to The Daily Beast Podcast wherever you get your podcasts or at the link in bio.⁠
⁠
#Epstein #JeffreyEpstein #Merr

I interrupt your day to inform you the @nytimes published a recipe for an arepa - a Reina Pepeada. Colombians and Venezuelans fight over who came up with the arepa. But this particular arepa is all about Venezuela. 🇻🇪

Ok, you can proceed with your life, now.

Trump’s approval ratings have now been under 50% for a whole year. 

For me, personally, it’s been more like 10 years since I’ve found him abhorrent. But I warmly welcome all the late arrivals.

Ana Navarro habla conmigo sobre su esperanza de ver una Cuba libre. Escucha su nuevo podcast BLEEP! con Ana Navarro en iHeartRadio, con episodios nuevos todos los lunes, parte de The My Cultura Podcast Network. #FreeCuba #CubaLibre 🇨🇺

Here’s the full clip of Jorge Ramos waxing poetic about his favorite (seldom used) bad-word. In our full conversation, he and @paoramos share their perspective on what is happening in Cuba, Mexico and Venezuela (where Jorge was once detained by Maduro). And we talk US politics. Tune into #BleepWithAnaNavarro for new episodes every Monday. You can listen wherever you get your podcasts.

In my house, today we celebrate the Feast Day of St. Benito of Puerto Rico. 🇵🇷🇵🇷🇵🇷

Happy 32nd Birthday, @badbunnypr. Thank you for always representing, standing up for our people with pride, showcasing our heritage, and taking our music around the world. You bring many of us so much joy - and those you make mad, fuck ‘em.

Y como dice @theritamoreno, “Néné, mira que tu estás bueno.”
Our Broadway queen! 🤩 From rehearsals to showtime, come behind the scenes for @ananavarrofl’s Broadway debut for one night only in @buenavistamusical!

Jorge Ramos is one of the world’s most respected journalists. I’ve never seen him squirm as much as when I asked him what is his favorite cuss word. You’re gonna have to listen to this week’s episode of #BleepWithAnaNavarro to hear his answer. I don’t know what was funnier - Jorge’s answer or @paoramos’ face, reacting to hearing her dad curse in public for the first time. 🤣🤣🤣

You can catch #Bleep wherever you listen to your podcasts or on YouTube.
@ananavarrofl: "[Trump] has turned into the Oprah Winfrey of regime change. 'You get regime change! And you get regime change! And you get regime change!"

@ananavarrofl is joined by legendary journalists @JorgeRamosNews and @PaoRamos for a conversation you don’t want to miss.

They break down Donald Trump’s growing fixation on Latin America, the latest shake-up at the White House after he fired Kristi Noem as Homeland Security Secretary, and what his expanding focus on countries like Iran could mean for global politics. 

Tune in for sharp analysis and the political context you need.

Listen to the new episode of #BleepwithAnaNavarro now on the fr

A new episode of #bleepwithananavarro drops today. There is a lot going on with iran, obviously. But don’t fall asleep on Latin America. There’s a hell of a lot brewing there and in the US. Today I discuss it all with the great @jorgeramosnews & @paoramos. Catch it wherever you get your podcasts. And leave me your thoughts and comments and suggestions. I so appreciate your support in this new journey. ❤️❤️❤️

Let’s be clear about something: Trump, Stephen Miller and whatever DHS Secretary they appoint….they’re not going after the worse of the worse. They are going after anybody they can, who is brown. It doesn’t matter if they are good, decent people, contributing to America. It doesn’t matter if they have committed no crimes and abided by the rules. It doesn’t matter if they are children or minors. Only thing that matters, is meeting their quota of brown people deported.
